project.name: PARAKH
project.theme: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement by CRPF
project.tagline: An officer-first procurement evaluation platform that makes tender decisions transparent, consistent, and defensible.
project.philosophy: The system does not make sovereign eligibility decisions. It assembles evidence, applies deterministic rules, and preserves a reviewable trail so procurement officers can explain every outcome.

problem_points: Government tender evaluation is document-heavy, time-sensitive, and vulnerable to inconsistent interpretation.
Bid packs contain mixed formats such as digital PDFs, scans, photos, handwritten notes, annexures, and corrigenda.
Officers face personal accountability under RTI, vigilance review, audit, and legal challenge if a decision cannot be defended.
Generic black-box AI is risky because OCR uncertainty, ambiguous clauses, and subjective criteria can cause silent errors.
fit_points: PARAKH matches the theme by applying AI only where it adds traceable operational value: document understanding, structured extraction, and decision support.
Deterministic rules handle objective criteria, while uncertain or subjective cases are escalated to officers instead of being auto-rejected.
The solution is tailored to procurement realities such as tender-side versioning, bidder-side evidence capture, and audit-ready export.
The platform directly addresses the explanation gap by preserving evidence, reasoning, overrides, and tamper-evident event history.

modules.name: Tender Understanding Engine
modules.purpose: Creates a versioned criteria manifest from tender-side rules, staged into administrative, technical, and capacity checks.

modules.name: Bidder Document Intelligence
modules.purpose: Accepts bidder uploads, extracts text and fields, and turns heterogeneous documents into structured evidence.

modules.name: Evaluation and Ambiguity-Resolution Engine
modules.purpose: Maps evidence to criteria and produces deterministic three-state verdicts: Eligible, Not Eligible, or Needs Manual Review.

modules.name: Human-in-the-Loop Workbench and Audit System
modules.purpose: Lets officers review criterion-level logic, record overrides with reason codes, inspect audit history, and export reports.

workflow_steps: Create or open a tender record.
Upload tender-side documents such as NIT, QR, annexures, corrigenda, and ATC files.
Generate a draft manifest from the seeded evaluation criteria and approve the final manifest version.
Register a bidder and upload checklist-driven submission documents.
Run document ingestion to extract evidence fields from uploaded bidder files.
Evaluate the bidder against the approved manifest to produce criterion-level events and overall status.
Review evidence, record officer overrides where required, inspect the audit timeline, and export Excel or PDF reports.
features: Structured field extraction for finance, compliance, ballistic, sizing, and experience checks
Three-state verdicting with hard disqualification flags
Officer override capture with structured reason codes

checklist_docs.name: Industrial License
checklist_docs.purpose: Validate manufacturing authorization for bullet resistant jackets.

checklist_docs.name: EMD Proof
checklist_docs.purpose: Confirm earnest money deposit amount, instrument type, and validity.

checklist_docs.name: Ballistic Test Reports
checklist_docs.purpose: Verify BIS Level-6 protection for front, back, and side panels.

checklist_docs.name: Technical Compliance
checklist_docs.purpose: Confirm camouflage pattern alignment and required size mix.

checklist_docs.name: Annual Turnover Certificate
checklist_docs.purpose: Measure bidder and OEM average turnover against thresholds.

checklist_docs.name: Past Performance Records
checklist_docs.purpose: Assess large-order supply history for comparable items.

checklist_docs.name: OEM Authorization
checklist_docs.purpose: Validate supply-chain legitimacy for non-OEM bidders.

checklist_docs.name: PAN and TIN Certificates
checklist_docs.purpose: Establish tax identity and legal standing.

checklist_docs.name: Additional Docs (ATC)
checklist_docs.purpose: Capture extra administrative documents requested by tender conditions.

security: Role-based access for ADMIN and OFFICER
infra: Redis stub for future async workers

prototype_limits: Digital-text PDFs work best; OCR quality depends on document clarity and local Tesseract availability.
The current Redis container is present for future worker integration but is not yet wired into background task execution.
Clause-classifier and broader LLM-style features are intentionally bounded; final verdicting is rule-based and officer-reviewable.
The seeded manifest is generated from fixture CSV files rather than full live tender clause extraction.
future_scope: Automated clause extraction from full tender packs and corrigenda chains
Bilingual and handwritten document robustness for field-heavy Indian procurement files
Committee mode, clarification request tracking, and deeper collaboration workflows
Advanced analytics across tenders, bidders, overrides, and recurring risk patterns
Deployment hardening for government cloud environments and production security controls
Model-assisted evidence ranking and summarization without compromising deterministic verdict control
